title: selaginella maxima
intro: Selaginella maxima, also known as the 'Cape Celadine', is a type of plant belonging to the family Selaginellaceae, which is a genus of vascular plants commonly referred to as 'resurrection plants' due to their ability to revive and recover from desiccation. Traditionally, Selaginella maxima has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reduced oxidative stress, improved cardiovascular health, and potential anti-cancer properties. Selaginella maxima is often prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and can also be used as a tincture or added to capsules for consumption.
